results.command: bash -lc 'log="$OUT/paired-baseline-server-$BASE_PORT-$$.log"; "$BASE_SERVER" --bind 127.0.0.1 --port "$BASE_PORT" --mode strict >"$log" 2>&1 & pid=$!; cleanup(){ kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT; for i in {1..100}; do grep -q ready "$log" && break; kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null || exit 1; sleep 0.05; done; grep -q ready "$log" || exit 1; "$BASE_BENCH" --host 127.0.0.1 --port "$BASE_PORT" --clients 50 --requests 1000000 --pipeline 16 --workload set --keyspace 10000 --datasize 3 --json-out "$OUT/paired-baseline-set-p16-1m-last.json" --key-prefix om-ohsk5-3-pair-base >/dev/null; cleanup; trap - EXIT'

bash -lc 'log="$OUT/paired-candidate-server-$CAND_PORT-$$.log"; "$CAND_SERVER" --bind 127.0.0.1 --port "$CAND_PORT" --mode strict >"$log" 2>&1 & pid=$!; cleanup(){ kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT; for i in {1..100}; do grep -q ready "$log" && break; kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null || exit 1; sleep 0.05; done; grep -q ready "$log" || exit 1; "$CAND_BENCH" --host 127.0.0.1 --port "$CAND_PORT" --clients 50 --requests 1000000 --pipeline 16 --workload set --keyspace 10000 --datasize 3 --json-out "$OUT/paired-candidate-set-p16-1m-last.json" --key-prefix om-ohsk5-3-pair-cand >/dev/null; cleanup; trap - EXIT'
